mapper.select: SELECT userId, username, email, avatarUrl, createdTime FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId}
SELECT username FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId}
SELECT avatarUrl FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId}
SELECT password FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT userId FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, email, password, avatarUrl, createdTime) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{avatarUrl}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT userId, username, email, avatarUrl, createdTime FROM user WHERE username LIKE #{searchValue} OR email LIKE #{searchValue} LIMIT #{start}, #{size};
